def positive_long_parameter_list_of_primitives_without_options_object():
    rule_id = "long_parameter_list_of_primitives_without_options_object"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag functions whose many primitive parameters obscure meaning and encourage call-site mistakes."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
